diagComments.excerpt:
Hi @Lalla80111! 👋

**Please provide:**
- manufacturerName: `zb_manufacturer_name`
- productId: `zb_product_id`
- Diagnostics Report

Get these from [Developer Tools](https://tools.developer.homey.app)

*Auto-response - maintainer will review soon.*

Hi @Lalla80111!

**You're on an outdated version!** v5.5.897 is very old - please update to **v5.5.933** (latest).

Your device **_TZ3000_b4awzgct / TS0041** is already supported in the **button_wireless_1** driver.

**Steps to fix:**
1. Update the app to v5.5.933 from the Homey App Store
2. Delete the device from Homey
3. Restart Homey (Settings > General > Restart)
4. Re-pair the device - it should appear as **1-Button Wireless Controller**

The device has cluster 57344 (0xE000) which requires specific handling that has been improved in recent versions.

If after updating it still shows as 'unknown zigbee', please send a Diagnostic Report from the device settings.

Thanx for your support, I might have found the issue here. Or maybe I was just lucky :) My buttons and sensors has uppercase mixed with lowercase in the "manufacturerName": "_TZ3000_b4awzgct" and _TZ3000_fllyghyj
When I took the sourcecode and edited the driver files with uppercase in TZ and lowercase rest, and uploaded to Homey it worked.
Looks like it manufacturer name is case-sensitive.

I'll do some more research

Lalla

Hello again dlnraja :)
I got the temp. sensor and the switch added if I correct the tz to TZ in the code, so I want to ask you if you can change these values:

In the "app.json" file:  change "_tz3000_fllyghyj" to "_TZ3000_fllyghyj"
In the "app.json" file:  change "_tz3000_b4awzgct" to "_TZ3000_b4awzgct"

In the "drivers\climate_sensor\driver.compose.json" file change "_tz3000_fllyghyj" to "_TZ3000_fllyghyj"
In the "drivers\button_wireless_1\driver.compose.json" file change "_tz3000_b4awzgct" to "_TZ3000_b4awzgct"


The switch doesn't seem to work, it's added and the battery is showing, but not able to make a working flow.
